name: Weather Report
description:
__Height:__ 192 cm 
__Nationality:__ Italian-American
__Occupation:__ Delivery Boy (formerly) 
__Stand:__ Weather Report

Weather Report is an amnesiac and fellow inmate who seeks his memory and allies himself with Jolyne Cujoh. 

Weather is a Stand User controlling the surrounding atmosphere through his ability, which is also named Weather Report.
~!He later develops Heavy Weather, after recovers his memory, representing the release of his basic Stand's full power; fostering a particular, bizarre delusion in all within its range.!~

~!His real name is Domenico Pucci, Weather was originally born to the wealthy Pucci family, the younger of fraternal twins. He was stolen from the clinic nursery by a woman whose own baby had died the same day, soon after birth. He lived his live in the other family with the name of Wes Bluemarine.!~
